threats.title: Google Blocks 8.3B Policy-Violating Ads in 2025, Launches Android 17 Privacy Overhaul
threats.summary: Google this week announced a new set of Play policy updates to strengthen user privacy and protect businesses against fraud, even as it revealed it blocked or removed over 8.3 billion ads globally and suspended 24.9 million accounts in 2025. threats.title: Coast Guard's New Cybersecurity Rules Offers Lessons for CISOs
threats.summary: The Maritime Transportation Security Act (MTSA) requires plans to protect OT systems, audits by independent third parties, and a hybrid OT-security role.

threats.title: NIST Limits CVE Enrichment After 263% Surge in Vulnerability Submissions

threats.title: Operation PowerOFF Seizes 53 DDoS Domains, Exposes 3 Million Criminal Accounts
threats.summary: An international law enforcement operation has taken down 53 domains and arrested four people in connection with commercial distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) operations that were used by more than 75,000 cybercriminals.
